ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male or female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket details */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cabin details */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (S, C, or Q) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (1 for survived, 0 for not survived) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number, if any */,
  "body_number" TEXT /* Body number, if the passenger did not survive */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the passenger's travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "booking_agent" TEXT /* Name of the booking agent or travel agency */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the booking agent */,
  "ticket_class" TEXT /* More detailed classification of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the cabin (A, B, C, etc.) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "cabin_size" REAL /* Size of the cabin in square feet */,
  "cabin_view" TEXT /* View from the cabin (e.g., ocean view, no view) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES ship_layout ("pclass"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_deck FOREIGN KEY ("deck") REFERENCES ship_layout ("deck")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Port code (S, C, or Q) */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency of the port */,
  "local_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken at the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses in the family */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children in the family */,
  "family_head" TEXT /* Head of the family */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total number of family members */,
  "family_status" TEXT /* Status of the family (e.g., survived, partially survived, did not survive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship within the family (e.g., child, parent, sibling) */,
  "age_at_embarkation" REAL /* Age of the family member at the time of embarkation */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (1 for survived, 0 for not survived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the passenger data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_layout" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout entry */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the ship (A, B, C, etc.) */,
  "cabin_range" TEXT /* Range of cabin numbers on the deck */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deck and cabin layout */,
  "deck_size" REAL /* Size of the deck in square feet */,
  "deck_features" TEXT /* Features of the deck (e.g., dining area, entertainment, gym) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id")
)
